_metadata._note: Hard rules only. JD-language redlines surface as process probes, not auto-declines. Update this file when geographic/comp stance shifts.

geographic.remote_only_rationale: Values mismatch — Matt holds that distributed teams underperform; in-person collaboration is required for the work to land. This is not a logistics preference, it's a stance on how teams operate.
geographic._note: Preferred metros are weighting after the filter passes, not gating logic. In-person anywhere is in-scope on the rule.

compensation._note: Director floor / VP target. When salary is unspecified in the JD (most cases), don't auto-decline — verify in screen.

engagement_modes.apply: Capability solid, filter passes, no special handling needed. Cold app or warm intro both viable.
engagement_modes.apply_with_caveat: Capability has a framable gap — typically a required item recoverable through narrative reframing or visible adjacent evidence. Or a notable item to verify in screen before fully committing.
engagement_modes.pass: Capability fundamentally insufficient, OR filter fails (remote-only / clear comp mismatch), OR no realistic path through despite engine showing Apply.
